agent-transcript-analysis.title: Agent Transcript Analysis
agent-transcript-analysis.description: Inspect, redact, and analyze coding agent session transcripts to surface actionable advice on human prompting, Skills (create/modify/delete), and MCP servers (create/modify/delete).

agent-transcript-capture.title: Agent Transcript Capture
agent-transcript-capture.description: Stop-event hook that captures complete agent session archives (transcripts, subagents, tool results) to cloud storage on task completion. Bundles a single hook and nothing else.
